records.ety: [Sp. patata potato, batata sweet potato, from the native American name (probably batata) in Hayti.]

defs: A plant (Solanum tuberosum) of the Nightshade family, and its esculent farinaceous tuber, of which there are numerous varieties used for food. It is native of South America, but a form of the species is found native as far north as New Mexico.
